author: chinoryunqin
description: 为 Obsidian 笔记点亮 AI 之光。支持 Claude、GPT、MiniMax、Kimi，提供总结、翻译、深度剖析、提取待办、续写、润色等快捷操作，并可直接将结果写回笔记。 - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: rick
manifest.description: AI assistant for your notes. Summarize, translate, analyze, extract tasks, polish, and write the result back to your file. Supports Claude, GPT, Minimax, and Kimi.
manifest.name: Lumen

name: Lumen

releases.author: chinoryunqin
releases.description:
Round 3 of marketplace review fixes:

- "MiniMax" → "Minimax" in the provider dropdown (sentence-case required)
- API key placeholder cleaned up
- minAppVersion 1.4.0 → 1.7.2 (Workspace.revealLeaf availability)
- Dropped deprecated builtin-modules dependency in favor of Node's module.builtinModules

No functional changes.

releases.author: chinoryunqin
releases.description:
Marketplace compliance fixes — all checks from official `eslint-plugin-obsidianmd` now pass:

- Network: `fetch` → `requestUrl` (all 4 providers)
- Timers: `setTimeout` → `window.setTimeout`
- Popout-window compat: `document.activeElement` → `activeDocument.activeElement`
- Lifecycle: do not detach leaves in `onunload` (preserves user's panel position)
- Commands: removed plugin name from command label
- Style: normalized API key/UI wording per style guide
- Type safety: wrapped all async event handlers with `void`
- Manifest: cleaner, no special characters in description

No functional changes — same six quick actions, same four providers, same file-editing buttons.

releases.author: chinoryunqin
releases.description:
Marketplace review fixes:

- Removed the word "Obsidian" from manifest description (redundant per directory rules)
- Description now ends with ASCII punctuation

No functional changes.

releases.author: chinoryunqin
releases.description:
Initial release of **Lumen** — AI assistant for Obsidian, inspired by Notion AI.

### Features
- Right sidebar panel with quick actions + chat mode
- 6 built-in actions: 总结 / 翻译 / 深度剖析 / 提取待办 / 续写 / 润色
- Reads current note as context; respects text selection
- Direct file editing: replace selection / append / overwrite
- Multi-provider: Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT, MiniMax 海螺, Kimi 月之暗面
- Test connection button to verify API key + model

### Install
1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` below
2. Drop them into `<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/lumen-ai-assistant/`
3. Enable in Settings → Community Plugins

Or wait for the marketplace submission to land 🪶
